description: Linguagem Swift para Termux no Android ARM64. Inclui o compilador Swift via pkg, sourcekit-lsp (language server oficial) e suporte a Swift Package Manager (swift build / swift run).

install_steps.description: Instalando o compilador Swift via pkg

install_steps.command: test -f "$PREFIX/bin/sourcekit-lsp" && echo 'sourcekit-lsp OK' || echo 'AVISO: sourcekit-lsp nao encontrado em $PREFIX/bin'

config_steps.command: sourcekit-lsp --version 2>&1 && echo 'OK: sourcekit-lsp disponivel' || echo 'AVISO: sourcekit-lsp nao encontrado no PATH'
swift package --version 2>&1 && echo 'OK: Swift Package Manager disponivel'

sdk_config.new_project_cmd: mkdir -p $name && cd $name && swift package init --type executable
